text.title: Rust Ownership Model Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply rust-ownership end-to-end.

step.name: run-clone-audit
step.action: Run audit-clones.sh; categorise each clone as required / removable / fix.

step.name: rewrite-removable-clones
step.action: Switch to &T or &mut T; lift lifetimes where needed.

step.name: install-ci-gate
step.action: Run audit-clones.sh on PR; warn on regression.
